top_signals.reason: Boeing holds two NASA contracts totaling $32.9B both over $1B threshold earning +15pts each; cross-reference confirms 29 corruption indicators and 29 social mentions on both contracts triggering +25pts cross-reference boost with 1.3x multiplier for multiple signals on same ticker. Elevated corruption indicator count warrants monitoring but contract size and dual-award pattern support a cautious long.

Boozman made multiple same-day bond ETF purchases (IEF + IEI) triggering the 1.3x multiplier on a base congressional score; simultaneous sale of growth ETF IVW suggests deliberate risk-off rotation into Treasuries. Pattern across multiple tickers raises conviction for a defensive positioning trade.

Simultaneous purchase with IEF by same senator triggers multiple-signal 1.3x multiplier; paired with IVW sale this forms a clear Treasury-rotation pattern worthy of follow. Defensive bond positioning across two ETFs on same date elevates signal confidence.

Rubio signed a bilateral Critical Minerals Framework with India, a Cabinet-level post with market keywords triggering +25pts, but no rare earth China escalation signal present to add +20pts. Score insufficient without corroborating contract or congressional trade data.

Bechtel National holds a $17.2B DOE contract clearing the +15pt threshold but is privately held with no publicly traded ticker and zero social mentions or corruption indicators in cross-reference. No actionable public equity trade available; signal noted for private credit or subcontractor plays.

Offshore papers confirmed match at 100% for Howard Lutnick adds +30pts base, but no corroborating trade, contract, or legislative signal found to cross-reference. Insufficient actionable signal without additional indicators.

Small congressional purchase of Eaton Corp near the senator's bond rotation trades; low dollar amount limits conviction despite infrastructure-adjacent exposure. No contract or cross-reference signals to boost score materially.

No Immunity for Glyphosate Act introduced in both chambers targets Bayer/Monsanto glyphosate liability shield, cross-referencing House and Senate versions adds +25pts for dual-chamber signal. Insufficient additional political trade or contract signals to elevate to actionable BUY/SELL.
Senate sale of eToro near IPO lock-up period warrants caution; no additional corroborating signals to amplify score. Congressional trade base score only with no cross-reference boost.
Small congressional purchase of regional bank with no corroborating signals or elevated news velocity. Base congressional trade score only, insufficient signal strength to act.
Small congressional purchase of JPMorgan with no corroborating contracts or cross-reference signals. Insufficient signal strength to generate actionable trade thesis.
Moderate congressional purchase of PepsiCo with no cross-reference or contract signals to elevate conviction. Base score only; no actionable edge detected.
Sale of S&P 500 Growth ETF by senator later seen rotating into bonds; standalone signal is base score only. Part of broader risk-off pattern but dated relative to bond purchases.

Military construction appropriations bill HR8469 passed House and received in Senate, signaling defense sector spending continuation. No sole-source contract, congressional trade, or cross-reference indicator present to push score to actionable threshold.
